description: Bobbi and Skye encounter the blue-skinned man in the hospital using liquid nitrogen to disguise himself. He attacks them; Skye’s attempted defense backfires as her newfound ability triggers tremors that damage her weapon and allow the Kree to escape. The aftermath leaves Skye shaken and deeply concerned about her powers.

transcript.line: You do not want to fight me.
We just have some questions for you.
